forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southeasterly in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula in the morning and early afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning easterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny morning. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning easterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny morning. Slight chance of a shower in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Partly cloudy. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 25 km/h before tending south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:30am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and early afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h before dawn. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning easterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny morning. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 30 km/h before tending south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the early morning. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Sunny day. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 30 km/h before turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the north in the early morning. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny day. Medium chance of showers in the evening. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon then tending southerly in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the west. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending easterly during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon then tending southerly in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the early morning. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending easterly during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the west in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 29.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting west to northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon then tending southeast to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures 25 to 30.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Mostly sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 30.
Sunny. Winds easterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 31.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 33.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly in the middle of the day then tending south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:30am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Ceduna, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Ceduna, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor in the evening. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers west of Nullarbor, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending east to northeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then tending south to southeasterly in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:30am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the east coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning easterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures 27 to 34.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the far west, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 34.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the far west, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 36.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then tending northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 30s.
Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 28 to 36.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 35.

Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 36.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 35.
